layers.name: BASE
layers.effect: CLIP/text understanding, tag and character knowledge, and global UNet conditioning. Important for vocabulary, concept knowledge, and preserving or changing default style foundations.

layers.name: IN00
layers.effect: Hands, contours, local separation, contrast edges, and finger stability.

layers.name: IN01
layers.effect: Background richness, distance feeling, background detail, and clothing information density.

layers.name: IN02
layers.effect: Body type, hair mass, clothing structure, and drawing density.

layers.name: IN03
layers.effect: Downsample stage for coarse structure transfer and spatial compression.

layers.name: IN04
layers.effect: Face appearance, expression, facial design, and concept-conditioned structure with transformer support.

layers.name: IN05
layers.effect: Body and face-supporting transformer stage without skip connection; useful for structure and concept transfer.

layers.name: IN06
layers.effect: Downsample stage that supports clothing and pre-shading color density flow.

layers.name: IN07
layers.effect: Core pose structure, limb motion, and dynamic pose individuality.

layers.name: IN08
layers.effect: Human-body design, perspective, physique, and limb attachment stability.

layers.name: M00
layers.effect: Middle integration, atmosphere, whole-image mixing, and how pose, face, and style blend together.

layers.name: OUT00
layers.effect: Accessory, skin feel, gloss, and decoded structure finishing with transformer support.

layers.name: OUT01
layers.effect: Accessory and skin-detail continuation with transformer support.

layers.name: OUT02
layers.effect: Upsample-inclusive output stage for decoded detail reconstruction and finishing.

layers.name: OUT03
layers.effect: Eyes, pupils, and face-feature shaping with strong face impact.

layers.name: OUT04
layers.effect: Face shape and facial contour shaping.

layers.name: OUT05
layers.effect: Nose, ears, and base face structure with upsample support.

layers.name: OUT06
layers.effect: Mouth, jaw, teeth, and mouth-area structure without transformer.

layers.name: OUT07
layers.effect: Line quality, texture, lighting, shadow style, and painting style.

layers.name: OUT08
layers.effect: Color feel, region color separation, saturation, contrast, and final look lock.

layers.name: VAE
layers.effect: VAE encode/decode layers controlling latent conversion, reconstruction, and output texture/compression characteristics.

mode_notes.Checkpoint: Use these as guidance when designing checkpoint merge elemental ratios. Structure-heavy resblock and attention targets can change model identity strongly.
mode_notes.LoRA: For LoRA bake, prefer narrower targets when preserving the base model. attn2 and BASE are often useful for knowledge injection, while OUT07/OUT08 and proj/ff targets are useful for style/color transfer.
mode_notes.LyCORIS: LyCORIS can hit the same logical targets. Per-layer validity still matters; avoid suggesting targets that do not exist in the selected layer.
